summary: Created spec file at specs/feat-12499-issue-12-add-testimonials-5-6-7.md documenting the plan to add testimonials 5, 6, and 7.

Added testimonials.5 (Valentina Ríos, Colombia), testimonials.6 (Miguel Ángel Pérez, Mexico, with summitDate), and testimonials.7 (Camila Ruiz, Colombia) to src/i18n/es.ts with original Spanish texts.
Added English translations for testimonials.5, .6, .7 to src/i18n/en.ts.
Added Chinese translations for testimonials.5, .6, .7 to src/i18n/zh.ts.
Updated src/components/Testimonials.astro to include 3 new carousel entries (VR, MP, CR initials) for testimonials 5, 6, and 7 — carousel now shows 6 slides.
Testimonial 6 (Miguel Ángel Pérez) includes a summitDate prop ('enero de 2026' / 'January 2026' / '2026年1月').
All three new testimonials use the initials-avatar fallback (no photos available).
Build validation: npm run build — 7 pages built successfully, 0 errors.
Type validation: npx astro check — 0 errors, 0 warnings, 11 hints (all pre-existing).
